attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT OTM_hier.OTM_Level1,
OTM_hier.OTM_Level2,
OTM_hier.OTM_Level3,
OTM_hier.OTM_Level4,
OTM_hier.OTM_Level5,
OTM_hier.OTM_Level6,
OTM_hier.OTM_Level7,
OTM_hier.OTM_Level8,
OTM_hier.OTM_Level9,
OTM_hier.OTM_Level10,
OTM_hier.OTM_Level11,
OTM_hier.OTM_Level12,
OTM_hier.Rank_Level1,
OTM_hier.Rank_Level2,
OTM_hier.Rank_Level3,
OTM_hier.Rank_Level4,
OTM_hier.Rank_Level5,
OTM_hier.Rank_Level6,
OTM_hier.Rank_Level7,
OTM_hier.Rank_Level8,
OTM_hier.Rank_Level9,
OTM_hier.Rank_Level10,
OTM_hier.Rank_Level11,
OTM_hier.Rank_Level12,
OTM_hier.Leaf_terr_id,
OTM_hier.Leaf_terr_Name,
TO_CHAR (Terr_rank.Absolute_rank * POWER (10, 20)) AS ABSOLUTE_RANK,
mc.mc_cma_name "Qualifier Name",
mc.mc_condition "Qualifier Condition",
mc.mc_low_value "Qualifer Value",
ac.ac_split_percent_allocated "Split %",
ac.salesrep_number "Sales Agent No.",
ac.ac_agent "Sales Agent",
ac.ac_node_id "Node ID",
ac.ac_cisco_territory_type "OSH Territory Type",
ac.ac_otm_credit_start_date "Assignment Start Date",
ac.ac_otm_credit_end_date "Assignment End Date"
FROM (SELECT /*+ no_merge no_unnest*/ -- performance case# INC800003385690
L1.org_id,
PL.Name OTM_Parent_Level,
L1.Name OTM_Level1,
L2.Name OTM_Level2,
L3.Name OTM_Level3,
L4.Name OTM_Level4,
L5.Name OTM_Level5,
L6.Name OTM_Level6,
L7.Name OTM_Level7,
L8.Name OTM_Level8,
L9.Name OTM_Level9,
L10.Name OTM_Level10,
L11.Name OTM_Level11,
L12.Name OTM_Level12,
L1.RANK Rank_Level1,
L2.RANK Rank_Level2,
L3.RANK Rank_Level3,
L4.RANK Rank_Level4,
L5.RANK Rank_Level5,
L6.RANK Rank_Level6,
L7.RANK Rank_Level7,
L8.RANK Rank_Level8,
L9.RANK Rank_Level9,
L10.RANK Rank_Level10,
L11.RANK Rank_Level11,
L12.RANK Rank_Level12,
(CASE
WHEN L2.RANK IS NULL THEN L1.terr_id
WHEN L3.RANK IS NULL THEN L2.terr_id
WHEN L4.RANK IS NULL THEN L3.terr_id
WHEN L5.RANK IS NULL THEN L4.terr_id
WHEN L6.RANK IS NULL THEN L5.terr_id
WHEN L7.RANK IS NULL THEN L6.terr_id
WHEN L8.RANK IS NULL THEN L7.terr_id
WHEN L9.RANK IS NULL THEN L8.terr_id
WHEN L10.RANK IS NULL THEN L9.terr_id
WHEN L11.RANK IS NULL THEN L10.terr_id
WHEN L12.RANK IS NULL THEN L11.terr_id
WHEN L12.RANK IS NOT NULL THEN L12.terr_id
END)
Leaf_terr_id,
(CASE
WHEN L2.RANK IS NULL THEN L1.name
WHEN L3.RANK IS NULL THEN L2.name
WHEN L4.RANK IS NULL THEN L3.name
WHEN L5.RANK IS NULL THEN L4.name
WHEN L6.RANK IS NULL THEN L5.name
WHEN L7.RANK IS NULL THEN L6.name
WHEN L8.RANK IS NULL THEN L7.name
WHEN L9.RANK IS NULL THEN L8.name
WHEN L10.RANK IS NULL THEN L9.name
WHEN L11.RANK IS NULL THEN L10.name
WHEN L12.RANK IS NULL THEN L11.name
WHEN L12.RANK IS NOT NULL THEN L12.name
END)
Leaf_terr_Name
FROM (SELECT /*+ no_unnest*/ -- performance case# INC800003385690
*
FROM jtf_terr_all
WHERE terr_id IN
(SELECT terr.terr_id
FROM (SELECT jta.terr_id,
jta.territory_type_id,
jta.org_id,
jta.start_date_active,
jta.end_date_active,
jta2.terr_id parent_terr_id,
jta2.territory_type_id
parent_terr_type_id
FROM jtf_terr_all jta, jtf_terr_all jta2
WHERE ( jta.parent_territory_id =
jta2.terr_id
AND jta.org_id = jta2.org_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')  BETWEEN jta.start_date_active
AND NVL (
jta.end_date_active,
TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')))) terr
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_types_all ttp2
ON ( terr.parent_terr_type_id =
ttp2.terr_type_id
AND terr.org_id = ttp2.org_id),
jtf_terr_types_all ttp
WHERE terr.territory_type_id =
ttp.terr_type_id
AND terr.org_id = ttp.org_id
AND ttp.name =
'Cisco TM SMB Territory Type'
AND ttp.name <>
NVL (ttp2.name,
'Non-SMB Territory Type'))) PL
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_all L1
ON L1.parent_territory_id = PL.terr_id
AND L1.org_id = PL.org_id
AND L1.territory_type_id = PL.territory_type_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN L1.start_date_active
AND NVL (L1.end_date_active, TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_all L2
ON L2.parent_territory_id = L1.terr_id
AND L2.org_id = L1.org_id
AND L2.territory_type_id = L1.territory_type_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN L2.start_date_active
AND NVL (L2.end_date_active, TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_all L3
ON L3.parent_territory_id = L2.terr_id
AND L3.org_id = L2.org_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN L3.start_date_active
AND NVL (L3.end_date_active, TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_all L4
ON L4.parent_territory_id = L3.terr_id
AND L4.org_id = L3.org_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN L4.start_date_active
AND NVL (L4.end_date_active, TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_all L5
ON L5.parent_territory_id = L4.terr_id
AND L5.org_id = L4.org_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN L5.start_date_active
AND NVL (L5.end_date_active, TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_all L6
ON L6.parent_territory_id = L5.terr_id
AND L6.org_id = L5.org_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN L6.start_date_active
AND NVL (L6.end_date_active, TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_all L7
ON L7.parent_territory_id = L6.terr_id
AND L7.org_id = L6.org_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN L7.start_date_active
AND NVL (L7.end_date_active, TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_all L8
ON L8.parent_territory_id = L7.terr_id
AND L8.org_id = L7.org_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN L8.start_date_active
AND NVL (L8.end_date_active, TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_all L9
ON L9.parent_territory_id = L8.terr_id
AND L9.org_id = L8.org_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN L9.start_date_active
AND NVL (L9.end_date_active, TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_all L10
ON L10.parent_territory_id = L9.terr_id
AND L10.org_id = L9.org_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN L10.start_date_active
AND NVL (L10.end_date_active, TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_all L11
ON L11.parent_territory_id = L10.terr_id
AND L11.org_id = L10.org_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN L11.start_date_active
AND NVL (L11.end_date_active, TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
LEFT JOIN
jtf_terr_all L12
ON L12.parent_territory_id = L11.terr_id
AND L12.org_id = L11.org_id
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN L12.start_date_active
AND NVL (L12.end_date_active, TO_DATE('01-01-3500', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))) OTM_hier,
(SELECT tq.terr_id,
tq.org_id,
sq.name mc_cma_name,
tv.comparison_operator mc_condition,
tv.low_value_char || TO_NUMBER (tv.low_value_number)
mc_low_value,
tv.high_value_char || TO_NUMBER (tv.high_value_number)
mc_high_value
FROM jtf_terr_qual_all tq,
jtf_seeded_qual_all_b sq,
jtf_terr_values_all tv
WHERE tq.qual_usg_id = sq.seeded_qual_id
AND tq.terr_qual_id = tv.terr_qual_id
AND tq.org_id = tv.org_id) mc,
(SELECT /*+ no_unnest*/ -- performance case# INC800003385690
jta.terr_id,
jta.org_id,
jrs.resource_id,
jtra.start_date_active ac_otm_credit_start_date,
jtra.end_date_active-1 ac_otm_credit_end_date,
jtra.attribute1 ac_split_percent_allocated,
jrgb.attribute1 ac_node_id,
jrs.salesrep_number Salesrep_number,
jrs.name ac_agent,
jtra.role ac_cisco_territory_type
FROM jtf_terr_all jta,
jtf_terr_rsc_all jtra,
jtf_rs_resource_extns jrre,
jtf_rs_groups_b jrgb,
jtf_rs_salesreps jrs
WHERE jta.terr_id = jtra.terr_id
AND jtra.resource_id = jrre.resource_id
AND jrre.resource_id = jrs.resource_id
AND jtra.GROUP_ID = jrgb.GROUP_ID
AND TO_DATE('$$PROCESS_DATE_PL', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN jtra.start_date_active
AND jtra.end_date_active - 1 ) ac,
(SELECT DISTINCT terr_id, absolute_rank
FROM JTF_TERR_ALL
WHERE org_id = 82) Terr_Rank
WHERE OTM_hier.Leaf_terr_id = mc.terr_id
AND OTM_hier.org_id = mc.org_id
AND OTM_hier.Leaf_terr_id = ac.terr_id
AND OTM_hier.org_id = ac.org_id
AND OTM_hier.Leaf_terr_id = Terr_rank.Terr_id
